mechanics.excerpt: For each skill bonus point in Martial Arts the character may choose t0 learn one of the fol lowing maneuvers See also Special Maneuvers 114, For clarity, we use the term you" when referring to your character and your opponent when referring to the other char- acter in tne melee_ Karate This subskill is highly offensive martial art form; It con centrates On delivering blows with hands_ elbows knees and feet to vital parts of the body: such as the stomach and throat Feint (Attack): Your target number to hit iS decreased by but damage iS divided in half (round down); target must make Knockdown Test you win the round even if the attack inflicts Fatigue.
